name: pump_fade_v4r_bear_window
description: Tests pump_fade_v4r (short-after-pump) specifically on the recent bear/choppy window (Oct 2025 – Apr 2026). The strategy has a known 360d baseline of PF=1.883, but that includes the 2025 bull run. This run isolates its bear-market performance — the most relevant regime right now. Goal: confirm whether dump-fading still works when pumps are less powerful and more frequent.
_goal: Determine if dump-fading (pump_fade_v4r) is a viable bear-market sleeve. If PF>1.2 on the Oct25–Apr26 window, this becomes the primary short-side strategy to deploy alongside pump_momentum_v1 on the long side — completing the full pump+dump system.
